title: Overplane spec metadata
description: YAML frontmatter metadata for an Overplane specification document. The base fields identify, classify, and summarize the spec; advisory extensions connect the document to the target repository area and spec format revision.

examples.description: Replace with a one-paragraph summary of this spec's purpose and deliverable.
examples.title: Bootstrap

description.description: Human-readable summary of the specification's purpose and deliverable.
description.default: Replace with a one-paragraph summary of this spec's purpose and deliverable.

id.description: Stable spec identifier. Use a hash-prefixed four-digit id for repository-local specs.

parent.description: Parent spec ids that this spec extends or depends on.

tags.description: Lowercase topic labels used for discovery and grouping.

title.description: Short display title for the spec.

author.description: Advisory author or maintainer display name.

created.description: Advisory creation date in ISO calendar form.

target_dir.description: Advisory repository-relative directory this spec targets.

spec_version.description: Advisory integer version of the spec document format.
